attack.title: PayPay management has made new demands about mandatory office attendance
attack.body: Despite protest from the employees and the extra cost to the company this policy is being enforced

detail.week: Is your Tokyo commute suddenly a nightmare?
detail.month: Did you move to a different city expecting you could work remotely?

attack.alert: Are you frustrated by this decision or other issues at the company?

form.title: We are forming a PayPay Workers Union
form.body: You didn't expect the mandatory office attendance changes, and you won't expect the next demands either
form.insurance: A union lets you push back against these changes
form.fight: We will <1>fight for your right to work from home</1> and let your voice be heard
form.form: We are gathering PayPay employees' opinions on workplace issues
form.please: Please let us know your thoughts
